---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem you're solving

<What pain point does this address? What use case is currently hard or impossible?>

## Proposed solution

<How would you solve it? Rough sketch is fine — implementation details are less important than the shape of the change.>

## Alternatives considered

<Optional: other approaches you thought about and why they're less good>

## Additional context

<Optional: links, similar features in other tools, related discussions>
